output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?opponent ?opponentLabel WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q2846717 ; wdt:P111 wd:Q13581 ; wdt:P110 ?opponent .
  ?opponent rdfs:label ?opponentLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?opponentLabel) = 'en')
}
output.answer: The Minnesota Vikings lost to the Pittsburgh Steelers (Super Bowl IX), Oakland Raiders (Super Bowl XI), and Los Angeles Rams (Super Bowl XIV) in the Super Bowl.
